allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const p='webapp/app.js';let s=fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\);const start=s.indexOf\('// ===== Music view \(YouTube Data API v3\) ====='\);const end=s.indexOf\('\\ncategoryList?.addEventListener'\);if\(start>=0&&end>start\){s=s.slice\(0,start\)+'// __MUSIC_PLACEHOLDER__\\n\\n'+s.slice\(end+1\);fs.writeFileSync\(p,s\);console.log\('ok','removed',\(end-start\),'bytes'\);}else{console.log\('not found',start,end\);}")
